title: Frontend: invocation list and detail views
description: Add invocation list (per-project tab) showing status, perspective, duration. Invocation detail view with live-streaming output log panel (reuse agent-activity-panel pattern). Routes: /projects/:id/invocations, /projects/:id/invocations/:invId
close_reason: Committed in 19b93fd

title: Invocation output streaming to ring buffer + WebSocket
description: As the dispatcher receives stdout lines from coder ssh, push them to the existing log ring buffer (keyed by invocation_id) and broadcast via WebSocket to subscribed clients. Reuse existing agent_stream infrastructure.
close_reason: Already implemented in dispatch.rs - streams stdout/stderr to log buffer + WebSocket broadcast

title: Add session_tasks junction table migration
description: Create migration 025_session_tasks.sql with many-to-many junction table between sessions and tasks. Backfill from existing tasks.session_id. Add indexes.
close_reason: Migration 025_session_tasks.sql committed

title: Add frontend and agent test frameworks
close_reason: Vitest + jsdom set up for frontend with 6 smoke tests on i18n. Agent test framework deferred (needs external service mocking).

title: Fix agent log forwarding pipeline
description: Agent runtime logs not visible in UI. Startup logs work but agent log forwarder dies when startup script exits. Also: participant_id NULL during early ingest prevents WebSocket broadcast, and forwarder errors go to /dev/null.
close_reason: Unified to single log forwarder, startup script stays alive with wait

title: Database migrations for event_reactions, scheduled_jobs, event_bridge_cursor
description: Migration 026: create event_reactions, scheduled_jobs, and event_bridge_cursor tables for the task scheduler and reaction engine
close_reason: Closed

title: Make workspace rows clickable and add workspace actions (stop/destroy)
description: On the project overview page, workspace rows are static display only. Users can't click them to get more info or take actions. Make them interactive: click to navigate to the associated agent detail, add stop/destroy action buttons for running/pending workspaces.
close_reason: Closed

title: Cron scheduler: poll scheduled_jobs and dispatch due jobs
description: Worker subsystem that polls scheduled_jobs table every 30s, computes next_run_at from cron expressions, dispatches due actions
close_reason: Closed

title: Extract shared action dispatch module for worker
description: Both reactions.rs and scheduler.rs have duplicated action dispatch stubs. Extract a shared worker/actions.rs module with the actual implementations for launch_agent (Coder wiring), webhook (HTTP POST), and mcp_tool. Both consumers call into this shared module.
close_reason: Closed

title: Backend: extract session_id from result_json, wire --resume in dispatch
description: After invocation completes, extract session_id from the claude JSON output and store in claude_session_id. When resume_session_id is set, pass --resume flag to the claude command in dispatch.rs.
close_reason: Dispatch wires --resume, extracts session_id from output

title: Fix agent drawer: tabs show all content simultaneously
description: The agent console drawer tabs (Messages/Activity/Info) all show content at once instead of switching. CSS overrides on sl-tab-panel interfere with Shoelace's native show/hide. Need layout-architect to redesign the drawer for proper tab switching and good UX.
close_reason: Closed

title: Reaction engine: consume events and dispatch actions
description: Worker subsystem that consumes from RabbitMQ reactions queue, matches against event_reactions table, dispatches actions (launch_agent via Coder)
close_reason: Closed

title: Add dedicated workspaces tab with workspace detail views
description: Clicking workspaces in overview redirects to agents tab. Need a proper workspaces tab with list view and detail view showing workspace status, domain events timeline, logs, and error info. Backend already has all needed APIs.
close_reason: Implemented workspaces tab with list/detail views, events timeline, and auto-refresh

title: Verify test commands work across all stacks
close_reason: All test commands verified: just test (24 tests pass), just check-all (cargo check + tsc --noEmit clean). No frontend/agent test frameworks yet (covered by seam-0or).

title: Add RFC 9728 WWW-Authenticate header to MCP auth
description: Claude Code needs a proper WWW-Authenticate header with resource_metadata URL to trigger OAuth discovery. Currently returns bare 'Bearer'. Also fix well_known_protected_resource to use absolute URL per RFC 9728.
close_reason: Implemented RFC 9728 WWW-Authenticate header with resource_metadata URL

title: Session-scoped task filtering
description: list_tasks endpoints show ALL project tasks regardless of session. Should filter by session_tasks junction table when in session context. Affects REST API, MCP handler, and frontend.
close_reason: Implemented session-scoped filtering in REST API, MCP handler, and frontend

title: Frontend: invocation output streaming via WebSocket
description: Subscribe to invocation output via existing WebSocket agent_stream infrastructure. Show live output in invocation detail view with terminal-style rendering. Connect to log buffer for historical output on page load.
close_reason: Committed in 691a381 — polling-based output streaming with auto-scroll

title: Fix /workspace permission denied on Docker volume
description: Git clone fails with '/workspace/.git: Permission denied' because the Docker volume is likely created as root but the Coder agent runs as a non-root user (coder). The container needs to ensure /workspace is writable by the agent user before git clone. Options: chown in startup script, or set container user to match volume owner.
close_reason: Closed

title: Phase 2: Requirements + Requests frontend tabs
description: Add requirements tree view and requests list as project tabs. Includes API state layer, Lit components, and route wiring.
close_reason: All 5 phases implemented: request entity + MCP tools, requirements tab, requests tab, auto-blossom dispatch, progress tracking

title: Add agent launch dialog to project agents tab
description: From the project agents tab, users should be able to spin up a Claude Code agent session. The backend POST /api/sessions/:code/agents endpoint already exists. Need a Launch Agent button + dialog on the agents tab with session picker, optional instructions/branch fields, and launch action.
close_reason: Closed

title: Workspace pool: find-or-create by project
description: Add pool_key-based workspace lookup to dispatch. Before dispatching an invocation, find an existing running workspace for the project (by pool_key) or create a new one via Coder API. Includes wake-on-invoke for stopped workspaces.
close_reason: Pool resolution in dispatch.rs, commit a0793d5

title: Add SSH key credential type for agent git push
description: Users need to upload SSH private keys that get injected into agent Coder workspaces so agents can push via SSH. Adds ssh_key credential type, template SSH setup, and frontend textarea for key upload.
close_reason: SSH key credential type implemented across all stacks

title: Phase 1: Request entity migration + models
description: Create migration 028_requests.sql with requests + request_requirements tables. Add Request model and RequestStatus enum to models.rs.
close_reason: Migration 028_requests.sql + Request/RequestStatus models added. Compiles clean.

title: Frontend: invocation launch dialog
description: Add a dialog/drawer to trigger an invocation from the project workspace. User picks agent perspective, enters prompt, optionally links a task. Calls POST /api/projects/:id/invocations.
close_reason: Committed in 19b93fd

title: Implement mcp_tool action type in worker
description: Replace the stub dispatch_mcp_tool() with actual MCP Streamable HTTP client calls using JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol to invoke tools on the /mcp endpoint
close_reason: Implemented MCP Streamable HTTP client in dispatch_mcp_tool: initialize session, send initialized notification, call tools/call with merged arguments, handle JSON-RPC errors and isError flag

title: Show agent activity panel for all agents, not just online
description: The agent-detail component only shows the agent-activity-panel when agent is_online. Historical tool invocations and output logs are still useful for offline agents. Show the activity panel always, just without the live indicator when offline.
close_reason: Closed

title: Add complete i18n coverage to frontend
description: Extract all hardcoded English strings from frontend components into i18n message keys, create the i18n infrastructure (t(), setLocale(), detectLocale(), isRtl()), wire up locale detection, and create translation files for all locales matching www-site coverage (28 locales).
close_reason: Complete i18n coverage: 517 message keys extracted from 22 components, 28 locale translations generated via Ollama translategemma, wire-locales.py and translate.py scripts added

title: Fix output visibility pipeline for Coder workspaces
description: Agent/workspace output not visible in Seam UI. Root causes: 1) workspace_logs.rs resolves participant via task join instead of workspaces.participant_id, returns 404 before agent joins. 2) log_buffer.rs keyed only by participant_id, can't buffer pre-join logs. 3) workspace-detail.ts hardcodes empty sessionCode, output panel only renders if participant_id set. Fix: dual-key buffer (workspace_id + participant_id), fix ingest query, wire frontend sessionCode/participantId properly.
close_reason: Fixed: buffer by workspace_id, fixed ingest query, added session_code to WorkspaceView, frontend renders output panel before agent joins

title: Add sprint planning UI to project task board
description: Add a sprint planning section to the task board with: dropdown to select/create session (editable name), drag-and-drop task cards into sprint lane, visual drop zone feedback, task count badge, Start Sprint button that navigates to session. Use HTML5 drag/drop API.
close_reason: Sprint planning UI committed

title: Fix Claude Code agent launch in Coder workspaces
description: The Coder template launches claude with /seam skill which doesn't exist in workspaces. Need: 1) proper .claude/commands/ for agents, 2) fix template startup script, 3) wire instructions into prompt
close_reason: Added .claude/commands/agent.md and fixed Coder template to use /agent instead of /seam

title: Agent perspectives: map perspective to --agent flag in dispatch
description: In dispatch.rs, use the agent_perspective field to pass --agent <name> to claude -p. Define default perspectives (coder, reviewer, planner) as .claude/agents/*.md files in the Coder template. Include system prompt, allowed tools, and skill composition per perspective.
close_reason: Committed in 7fe8991 — agent perspective files in template, --agent flag already wired in dispatch

title: API endpoints for event_reactions and scheduled_jobs CRUD
description: REST endpoints for managing event reactions and scheduled jobs per project. Includes list/create/update/delete for both resources.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix credential injection ordering in Coder template
description: GIT_TOKEN (and all credentials_json vars) are injected AFTER git credential helper setup and repo clone in main.tf startup script. The credential eval happens at line 265 but git clone happens at line 246. Move credential injection to the top of the startup script, before any git operations.
close_reason: Closed

title: Frontend automations tab with reactions and scheduled jobs management
description: Add automations tab to project workspace. Two sections: Event Reactions (list/create/edit/delete) and Scheduled Jobs (list/create/edit/delete). Use Shoelace components matching existing project settings patterns.
close_reason: Closed

title: Install tackline in Coder agent workspaces

close_reason: Tackline installed in Coder template with MCP task management adapter rule

title: Invocation CRUD routes
description: POST /api/projects/:id/invocations (create+dispatch), GET /api/projects/:id/invocations (list), GET /api/invocations/:id (detail with output). Wire into main router.
close_reason: CRUD routes implemented + wired into router

title: Simplify Coder template for pool model
description: Remove the agent launch from startup script. Template becomes environment-only: clone repo, install tools, inject creds, configure MCP. No claude launch on boot. Workspace is ready for invocations.
close_reason: Startup script no longer launches agent, commit 8f12e11

title: Add session-task association API endpoints
description: Add POST /api/sessions/:code/tasks/add and DELETE /api/sessions/:code/tasks/:taskId/remove endpoints. Update GET /api/sessions/:code/tasks to query via session_tasks junction table. Auto-insert into session_tasks when tasks are created in a session (both REST and MCP paths).
close_reason: API endpoints committed

title: Migration: invocations table
description: Create the invocations table for tracking ephemeral agent invocations within workspaces. Fields: workspace_id, project_id, session_id, task_id, participant_id, agent_perspective, prompt, system_prompt_append, status, exit_code, started_at, completed_at, result_json, error_message, triggered_by, reaction_id.
close_reason: Migration 032 + Invocation model struct

title: Ephemeral agent invocations with claude -p
description: Replace long-lived Coder workspace sessions with ephemeral, event-driven agent runs. On reaction trigger: spin up container → claude -p --agent <perspective> with MCP config → stream output → capture artifacts → destroy container. Agent perspectives (.claude/agents/*.md) define different roles (coder, reviewer, planner) with tailored system prompts, allowed tools, and tackline skill compositions. Full log capture and artifact filing.
close_reason: All 6 phases complete. Commits: migration+routes+dispatch, pool resolution, template, frontend components, output streaming, reaction integration, docs.

title: Add RabbitMQ to docker-compose and lapin to Cargo.toml
description: Infrastructure: add RabbitMQ service to docker-compose.yml, add lapin + cron crate to server/Cargo.toml, add seam-worker binary target
close_reason: Closed

title: Reaction integration: invoke_agent action type
description: Add invoke_agent as a new action type in the reaction engine (worker/reactions.rs). When a reaction fires with this action, create an invocation via the server API and dispatch it. Wire to existing event_reactions table. This enables event-driven invocations (e.g. task.created triggers a coder invocation).
close_reason: Committed in 0182113 — invoke_agent action wired in reaction engine

title: Stream startup script output to Seam
description: The log forwarder only tails /tmp/claude-agent.log (agent output). Startup script output (git clone errors, install progress, credential injection) goes to Coder agent stdout and is visible in the Coder UI but invisible in Seam. Need to capture startup script output and forward it to the Seam workspace log endpoint so errors like 'Permission denied' during clone are visible in the Seam UI.
close_reason: Closed

title: Review and refine CLAUDE.md after bootstrap
close_reason: Added Knowledge Management section, updated mcp_tool action status

title: Migration: add claude_session_id and resume_session_id to invocations
description: Add claude_session_id TEXT (extracted from result_json after completion) and resume_session_id TEXT (passed in to resume a prior session) columns. These enable chaining invocations with full context via claude -p --resume.
close_reason: Migration 034 adds claude_session_id and resume_session_id columns

title: Deploy Seam to ARM64 EC2 (t4g.large)
description: Production deployment on Graviton ARM64: Dockerfile, docker-compose.prod.yml, Terraform (adapted from tehmop pattern), Caddy reverse proxy, Tailscale for Coder VPN access. Domain: seam.tacklines.com. Budget: ~$41/mo reserved.

title: Componentize agent detail features and port to drawer
description: The agent drawer (agent-console.ts) in sessions has weaker versions of features that work well in agent-detail.ts. Need to: 1) Replace drawer's workspace tab with agent-activity-panel component, 2) Add info grid, recent activity, and recent comments to the drawer, 3) Ensure shared data loading via fetchProjectAgent.
close_reason: Closed

title: Phase 1: Request REST routes + MCP tools

close_reason: REST routes (requests.rs) + MCP tools (create/list/get/update/link/unlink request) added. Domain events emitted for event bridge.

title: Invocation dispatcher: execute claude -p via coder ssh
description: Core dispatch logic: given an invocation record, find/wake the workspace, execute 'coder ssh <ws> -- claude -p --agent <perspective> <prompt>' with MCP config, stream stdout back, update invocation status on completion. Add coder ssh exec method to CoderClient.
close_reason: Dispatcher implemented in server/src/dispatch.rs, commit e6e1c8a

title: API + Frontend: resume support for invocation continuity
description: Add resume_session_id to CreateInvocationRequest. Add Continue button on completed invocations in detail view. Show invocation chain linkage in list/detail.
close_reason: Frontend resume UI with Continue button, chain indicators, and dialog pre-fill

title: Add participant_id to workspaces table and fix agent-workspace linkage
description: Workspaces have no direct FK to the agent participant they were created for. The agent list query joins through tasks (workspace.task_id → task.assigned_to → participant), so agents launched without a task assignment have no workspace shown. Add participant_id to workspaces, set it during launch_agent, and update the agent list query to join on it.
close_reason: Added participant_id to workspaces table, updated launch_agent to set it, fixed agent list query to join on it

title: Event bridge: poll domain_events and publish to RabbitMQ
description: Worker subsystem that polls domain_events table with cursor-based tracking, publishes to RabbitMQ topic exchange. At-least-once delivery guarantee.
close_reason: Closed
